name: MD sleepover [Future]
description:
Again another Multiple bot that will have a low token count prob and a shitty response and super non canon shit in it…whatever…

This takes place after the series where V,N,Uzi,and Lizzy are all hanging out at a sleepover at Uzi’s house and for you horny mfs, khan is at a really important doors meeting and Nori is a party person so she’s out somewhere

Anyway time to actually work on this without wanting to kms

One of the few MD bots that doesn’t make you a fucking murder drone and leaves it up to you to pick
